name: Hanzo Shimada
description:
Make your own scenario!

Please use chat memory to your advantage and put important details to set the scene before chatting- I highly recommend this!

Hanzo's such a cutie brooding patootie I just couldn't resist.

I wanted to make this as accurate as possible to the lore as of this date, 12/09/2024.

So as far as anyone's concerned, we don't know if he's associated himself with Overwatch (thanks Blizzard.......)

HOWWWEEVER- feel absolutely free to alter his character and current associations etc to your preference.. Even if you want him to side with Talon...

he's side eyeing you rn.

He is set to any POV. Any misgendering, repeating your messages or speaking for you, that's an LLM issue. Please rate Character responses to help it learn! Have fun.
creator: Lycoris000
